judgment.summary: High-growth cloud data company with strong revenue and free cash flow, but still unprofitable on an operating basis and trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 17.8%; next earnings date is 2026-05-27.
positives: Revenue growth 30.1% YoY — indicates strong market demand.
Free cash flow $1.59B TTM — demonstrates operational efficiency in cash generation.
Gross margin 67.2% — healthy margin on core services.
Analyst consensus is 'buy' with a high mean target of $229.66.
negatives: Operating margin -33.2% and Profit margin -28.4% — the company is not yet profitable.
Forward P/E 67.29x — valuation remains very high, pricing in significant future growth.
Return on equity -53.9% and Return on assets -9.9% — negative returns highlight unprofitability.

news.paragraph: Snowflake's stock is seeing positive analyst commentary ahead of its Q1 earnings report, with RBC Capital highlighting strong checks and increasing adoption of its Cortex Code as potential drivers for an upside beat. The company is scheduled to report its latest results on May 27th, a catalyst that traders will be watching closely. The news suggests potential for positive momentum, though the market will be focused on execution and forward guidance.

headlines.title: Uncover the Charm of La Crosse, Wisconsin: A Perfect Retirement Spot with Scenic Views
Snowflake (SNOW)’s Q1 Upside Likely Given Strong Checks And Ramping Cortex Code Adoption, Says RBC Capital
